ksa_text: Conduct code reviews evaluating code quality, testing standards, performance implications, documentation completeness, and adherence to team coding standards.

dcwf.top_element_label: Identify and implement tooling for controlling the steps in a continuous integration (CI) and continuous deployment (CD) pipeline.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-T-004 (Technology Fundamentals/Task) scores 0.442 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.442). Scope is in_scope for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, Technology Fundamentals, composite 0.442. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Technology Fundamentals for Clinical AI Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technology Fundamentals appears in approximately 65% of Clinical AI Specialist job postings. Technical system fundamentals expected for senior clinical AI implementation roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Technology Fundamentals is market-validated for Clinical AI Specialist. Final decision: include.
